name: Chime Financial, Inc.
business: Chime provides digital banking products including checking and savings accounts, debit and credit cards, and liquidity products such as MyPay and SpotMe, primarily targeting everyday Americans earning up to $100,000 annually. The company has 9.5 million Active Members as of December 31, 2025, and generates revenue mainly from interchange fees on card transactions. Chime operates through partnerships with FDIC-insured banks, serving as a technology platform rather than a bank itself.
sellsTo: Everyday Americans earning up to $100,000 annually

exposures.sentence: We created Chime to help everyday people make progress in their financial lives.

catalysts.sentence: For the year ended December 31, 2025, the increase was primarily driven by a $212.5 million increase year over year from the full launch of MyPay in July 2024.
Additionally, we fully launched our Instant Loans product in March 2025, which contributed $24.7 million in transaction and risk losses.
On June 13, 2025, we closed our IPO of 36,800,000 shares of Class A common stock at a public offering price of $27.00.
In 2025, we launched MyPay at Work.

catalysts.event: ChimeCore fully operational processing all payments
catalysts.sentence: As of November 2025, ChimeCore processes all of the payments, transfers, deposits, withdrawals, and other financial transactions that are conducted through our platform.
In November 2025, our board of directors approved a share repurchase program with authorization to purchase up to $200.0 million of our Class A common stock at management’s discretion.

tamClaims.claim: 196 million people (nearly 75% of the adult population) earn up to $100,000 annually
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, 196 million people nearly 75% of the adult population earn up to $100,000 annually.
